description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with multiple flat-roofed sections and a predominantly white exterior. The structure is composed of several interlocking rectangular volumes, some with greenish-tan roofs, and includes a rooftop area with what appears to be solar panels. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, providing ample natural light to the interior. The property is set on a rectangular lot with a paved driveway or patio area and is surrounded by a cluster of trees, including both deciduous and flowering varieties. A small pool or water feature is visible near the paved area, and there is a circular gazebo or pergola among the trees. The overall setting suggests a contemporary suburban or urban residence with landscaped outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, multi-level house with flat roofs, large asymmetrical windows, and a white facade, set on a landscaped lot with trees and a small pool. The design features interlocking rectangular volumes and a rooftop solar array.
description_view_0: This view shows the side of the house with a clear view of the paved area, pool, and the landscaped section with trees and a gazebo.
description_view_1: The front of the house is visible here, with the main entrance, large windows, and a row of trees lining the property.
description_view_2: This angle highlights the opposite side of the house, showing the driveway, additional paved space, and the arrangement of trees to the left.
description_view_3: The rear of the house is shown, featuring garage doors, utility areas, and a view of the rooftop solar panels, with trees in the background.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a flat overhang, large glass door, and minimalistic steps, flanked by windows and set back from a paved approach.
